meta.title: Child of the Whispering Veil - World Bible
meta.description: World Bible for Imaria - a realm woven from the subconscious of Elara, a 9-year-old girl. Contains characters, locations, lore, and style guidelines for consistent story and image generation.

art_direction.mood: whimsical yet emotionally resonant, balancing wonder with melancholy

lighting.primary_lighting: bioluminescent glow, ethereal light sources, dramatic contrast between light and shadow
lighting.shadow_style: soft, mysterious shadows with hints of hidden depth

color_palette.color_mood: enchanted forest with warm nostalgic highlights against cool mysterious shadows
color_palette.palette_description: A dual palette: Whisperwood features luminous greens, silvers, and warm amber starlight; Gloomhaven features muted purples, grays, and cold blues with eerie fungal glows

characters.name: Lyra (Elara's Dream Persona)

physical_description.appearance: A 16-year-old forest guardian with an ethereal, otherworldly beauty. Antler-like branches grow from her hair, intertwining with flowing locks. Her eyes hold the light of stars.
physical_description.clothing_style: Cloak made of moth wings that shimmers with iridescent colors, forest-dwelling attire woven from natural materials

personality.motivations: Protect the Whisperwood and its inhabitants; help Elara process grief and anxiety; maintain the balance between light and darkness
personality.fears: Forgetting her purpose; failing to protect the forest; Elara losing her imagination forever
quirks: Collects memories in the Memory Well
Hums melodies from Elara's waking life

characters.background: Lyra is the dream manifestation of 9-year-old Elara's imagination and emotional resilience. When Elara sleeps, she becomes Lyra, the Guardian of the Whisperwood. If Lyra dies in Imaria, Elara forgets her daydreams forever.

relationships.name: Elara
relationships.relationship: Dream self of the waking child

characters.notes: Lyra's power is directly tied to Elara's emotional state. When Elara is happy, Lyra is strong. When Elara struggles, Lyra weakens.

characters.name: Thaliss the Elder Tree

physical_description.appearance: A massive, ancient oak tree with a wise face carved into its trunk. Bark worn smooth by centuries, leaves that shimmer with hints of gold and silver.
distinctive_features: Roots that extend deep into the Whisperwood

personality.motivations: Guide Lyra in her quest; protect the Whisperwood; preserve the memory of Elara's grandfather
personality.fears: The forest falling to darkness; Lyra losing her way; being forgotten
quirks: Speaks in riddles and ancient wisdom
Roots tap messages through the earth

characters.background: Thaliss is secretly the living memory of Elara's deceased grandfather. He serves as Lyra's mentor, hiding this truth while guiding her through the challenges of the Starlight War.

relationships.name: Whisperwood
relationships.relationship: Guardian and heart of the forest

characters.notes: Thaliss represents the wisdom of previous generations of dreamers. His true identity as Elara's grandfather's memory is a key plot reveal.

characters.name: King Vorlag

physical_description.appearance: A towering Gloom warlord with a crown of fused Numbshards. His form shifts between solid shadow and vaguely humanoid shape. Eyes that burn with cold, hungry light.
physical_description.clothing_style: Armor crafted from Numbshards, crown of fused emotional stones

personality.motivations: Extinguish Starlight to 'protect' his people; gain power through Numbshards; escape the darkness of Gloomhaven
personality.fears: Starlight destroying his people; being trapped in eternal stagnation; Elara confronting her fears

characters.background: King Vorlag is a Gloom born from Elara's accumulated fears. He leads the raids on the surface to hoard Starlight, not realizing that destroying it would trap his people in eternal stagnation. He is a tragic antagonist - protecting his people through misguided means.
characters.notes: Vorlag is a sympathetic villain - he genuinely believes he's protecting his people. His defeat comes from understanding, not just combat.

characters.name: Elara

physical_description.appearance: A 9-year-old girl with an imaginative, wistful expression. Often lost in thought, with eyes that seem to see beyond the physical world.
distinctive_features: Small hands that reach for the stars
physical_description.clothing_style: Simple childhood clothes, often with a star pendant necklace

personality.motivations: Escape into daydreams; process her father's illness; find emotional strength; protect her inner world
personality.fears: Losing her father; forgetting her dreams; being consumed by fear; school bullies

characters.background: Elara is a 9-year-old girl who escapes into daydreams to cope with her father's illness and other life struggles. When she sleeps, she becomes Lyra in Imaria. Her real-world emotions directly affect the dream world - joy creates Starlight, fear creates Glooms.
characters.notes: Elara is the emotional core of the story. Her real-world struggles (father's illness, school bullies) manifest as challenges in Imaria.

locations.name: Whisperwood
locations.description: A mystical forest where trees communicate through Thought-Vines and glow with bioluminescent moss. The heart of Imaria, protected by Lyra. Home to Moonhounds and Whispervoles.
locations.atmosphere: Enchanted, peaceful, alive with soft whispers and gentle light. A sanctuary of wonder and magic.
locations.lighting_notes: Soft bioluminescent glow from moss and plants. Starlight crystals provide ethereal illumination. Twilight ambiance with dappled light through leaves.
locations.color_notes: Deep forest greens, luminous cyans and teals from bioluminescence, silver-white Starlight, warm amber accents from Memory Well.
locations.notes: The Whisperwood's health depends on Starlight. When Elara loses joy, the forest dims. Trees can communicate through Thought-Vines.

locations.name: Gloomhaven
locations.description: A labyrinthine subterranean city beneath the Whisperwood, lit by eerie fungal growths. Home to the Glooms - shadow beings born from Elara's fears. They mine Numbshards and crave Starlight.
locations.atmosphere: Oppressive, mysterious, melancholic. A place of shadows and echoes, where emotions are dulled and light is foreign.
locations.lighting_notes: Dim, eerie fungal glow in purples and grays. Cold, muted light. Shadows seem alive and moving. No natural light.
locations.color_notes: Muted purples, cold grays, sickly fungal greens, deep blacks. Stark contrast to Whisperwood's warmth.
locations.notes: Glooms are born from Elara's fears. They mine Numbshards - stones that dull emotions. Starlight is toxic to them but vital to the forest above.

locations.name: The Memory Well
locations.description: A hidden spring in the Whisperwood where Lyra can deposit Elara's cherished memories to create new Starlight. The most sacred place in the forest.
locations.atmosphere: Sacred, peaceful, emotionally resonant. A place of quiet reflection and transformation.
locations.lighting_notes: Warm, golden light emanating from within. Starlight crystallizes here, creating brilliant points of light. Peaceful, nostalgic glow.
locations.color_notes: Warm amber gold, crystalline white, soft greens from surrounding forest. The light here is the warmest in all of Whisperwood.
locations.notes: This is where Elara's cherished memories (like her father's laughter) become Starlight. It represents the power of positive emotions to fuel imagination.

lore.history: Imaria is a realm woven from the subconscious of Elara, a 9-year-old girl who escapes into daydreams. When she sleeps, she becomes Lyra, the Guardian of the Whisperwood. The world is built from generations of dreamers, and Elara's choices will shape it for the next child who dreams here.
rules: Starlight is crystallized energy from Elara's real-world joy - it powers the Whisperwood
Glooms are born from Elara's suppressed fears - confronting them weakens their hold
If Lyra dies in Imaria, Elara forgets her daydreams forever
Real-world actions affect Imaria - losing a memento causes Starlight to fade
The Memory Well converts cherished memories into new Starlight
Numbshards dull emotions - they are mined by Glooms and used as weapons
Thought-Vines allow communication with trees in the Whisperwood

terminology.Starlight: Crystallized energy from Elara's joy; vital to Whisperwood's survival; toxic to Glooms
terminology.Numbshards: Stones that dull emotions; mined by Glooms; used in King Vorlag's crown and armor
terminology.Thought-Vines: Magical vines that allow Lyra to hear trees' thoughts by touching them
terminology.Glooms: Shadow beings born from Elara's fears; inhabitants of Gloomhaven
terminology.Moonhounds: Wolf-like protectors with constellations etched in their fur; guardians of Whisperwood
terminology.Whispervoles: Tiny messengers who carry fragments of dreams
terminology.The Veil: The barrier between Elara's waking world and Imaria
terminology.Luminar: Lyra's staff forged from Starlight; her primary weapon and tool

creatures.name: Moonhounds
creatures.description: Wolf-like protectors with constellations etched into their fur. They guard the Whisperwood and assist Lyra.

creatures.name: Whispervoles
creatures.description: Tiny messengers who carry fragments of dreams between locations.

creatures.name: Glooms
creatures.description: Shadow beings born from Elara's fears. They dwell in Gloomhaven and crave Starlight.

themes.name: Balance
themes.description: Light (creativity) vs. darkness (fear) must coexist. Neither can be fully extinguished.

themes.name: Growth
themes.description: Elara's journey to process grief and anxiety strengthens Lyra's power.

themes.name: Legacy
themes.description: The Whisperwood is built from generations of dreamers; Elara's choices shape it for future children.

image_generation.style_prefix: digital fantasy art, semi-realistic illustration, bioluminescent, ethereal, atmospheric, magical realism
image_generation.quality_tags: highly detailed, cinematic lighting, emotional depth, professional concept art, 4k
image_generation.negative_prompt: photorealistic, gritty, horror, violent, modern technology, urban, harsh lighting, flat colors, blurry, low quality

story_generation.base_template: Write a {tone} scene set in {location} featuring {characters}. The scene should explore {theme} and advance the {conflict}.
story_generation.narrative_voice: Third-person limited, alternating between Lyra's perspective in Imaria and Elara's perspective in the waking world. Tone should balance wonder with emotional depth.
story_generation.pacing_guidelines: Alternate between moments of quiet wonder and tense action. Allow space for emotional reflection. Build tension through the connection between Elara's real-world struggles and Lyra's challenges.
